text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takamatsunomiya Kinen—and the first round
of the Cutie ♪ Derby—is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking inspiration from Curren Chan's videos,
Biko Pegasus has also leveled up her hero videos
for the big day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan, on the other hand, presses on as
usual with cute videos.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After admiring and praising each other's work,
they both declare the intent to take first place.
